Metadata.title: DocMosaic - Free Open Source Tool for Visual PDF Creation
Metadata.description: Free, open-source visual PDF builder - arrange images, text, and shapes into clean PDFs right in your browser. Also a headless React library (@docmosaic/core + @docmosaic/react) to embed a PDF editor in your own app.
Metadata.ogDescription: Create PDFs by arranging images in your browser - free and open source. Also a headless React library to embed a PDF editor in your app.

PdfEditor.title: PDF Editor - Create and Edit PDFs Online
PdfEditor.description: Create, edit, and arrange images in PDF documents with our intuitive visual editor. Perfect for ID documents, photo collections, and business documents.
PdfEditor.ogDescription: Create and edit PDFs with our visual editor

Hero.title: <caramel>PDF</caramel> Editing Shouldn't Be This <orange>Hard</orange> - So We <caramel>Fixed It</caramel>
Hero.subtitle: Drop in images, arrange them on a virtual page, and export a clean PDF - right in your browser. Fast, simple, DONE in seconds.
Hero.privacyNote: Privacy-First: Your files never leave your device.

Home.transparency1Desc: Anyone can audit the code. Security through transparency.
Home.transparency2Desc: Everything stays on your computer. Only anonymous usage statistics.
Home.transparency3Desc: Use our hosted version or run it yourself.
Home.supportDesc: DocMosaic is free, open-source, and privacy-friendly. If you find it useful, consider supporting its development to keep it running fast and free for everyone.
Home.helpDesc: This tool is open-source & free to use. If you have ideas, feedback, or found a bug, let us know!

SpringCards.noSignUpSubtitle: Just open & start. No accounts, no waiting, no hassle.
SpringCards.privateSubtitle: Everything stays on your device. No uploads, no personal data collection.
SpringCards.fasterSubtitle: No waiting for uploads or processing. Edit instantly.
SpringCards.freeSubtitle: No hidden fees, no premium features, no limits. Everything included.

ForDevelopers.title: Not just an editor - a <caramel>library you build with</caramel>
ForDevelopers.description: DocMosaic is open source and headless: compound {token} React primitives on a framework-agnostic core. Drop in the full editor, or compose your own UI.
ForDevelopers.point1Body: A flat Editor.* namespace that snaps together - no prop drilling.
ForDevelopers.point2Body: Document model, history, and the PDF pipeline. Bring your own UI.
ForDevelopers.point3Body: No backend, no uploads. State lives in React - privacy by default.

StackedCards.heading: Works on Desktop & Mobile - Edit <sage>PDFs</sage> Anywhere!
StackedCards.subheading: No need for a computer. Edit PDFs right from your phone - drag, arrange, and export in seconds.

desktop.title: Seamless Desktop Experience
desktop.description: Full functionality on larger screens with keyboard shortcuts.

allDevices.title: Works on All Devices
allDevices.description: No app needed. Just open in your browser and start editing.

export.title: Instant Export Anywhere
export.description: Download your PDFs instantly, whether you're on phone or desktop.

BouncyCards.heading: Built-In <cream>Solutions</cream> for Everyday Tasks
BouncyCards.whoIsThisFor:
Who Is This For?

From designers to teachers, DocMosaic helps anyone who needs to quickly create professional PDF documents.
BouncyCards.expatsDescription: Perfect for visa applications, ID & passport scans, and administrative paperwork. Arrange multiple scanned documents into professional PDFs that meet official requirements.
BouncyCards.businessesDescription: For companies, HR teams, and professionals who need quick document handling without expensive software. Generate contracts, reports, and business documents effortlessly.
BouncyCards.freelancersDescription: Assemble portfolio samples, image-heavy proposals, and invoice layouts visually. Perfect for client deliverables.
BouncyCards.marketersDescription: Create ad mockups, campaign reports, and simple PDF-based visuals without spending hours in Canva or Adobe.
BouncyCards.designersDescription: Place, resize, and align images easily to create print-ready layouts. Perfect for visual portfolios and client presentations.
BouncyCards.teachersDescription: Merge images into PDFs, annotate scanned documents, and reorder pages for assignments with ease.

PdfHero.title: Tame Your <caramel>PDFs</caramel> with Ease
PdfHero.subtitle: No sign-up. No personal data collection. No limits. Just open & use.
PdfHero.marqueeBottom2: The PDF tool you didn't know you needed
PdfHero.marqueeBottom3: Fix your PDFs in less time

Footer.tagline: Free and open source tool for creating structured PDF documents with arranged images.
